name: meetspace-desktop
description: MeetSpace - Self-Hosted Meeting Platform Desktop Client

scripts.build:dll: cross-env NODE_ENV=development TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true NODE_OPTIONS="-r ts-node/register --no-warnings" webpack --config ./.erb/configs/webpack.config.renderer.dev.dll.ts
scripts.build:main: cross-env NODE_ENV=production TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true NODE_OPTIONS="-r ts-node/register --no-warnings" webpack --config ./.erb/configs/webpack.config.main.prod.ts
scripts.build:renderer: cross-env NODE_ENV=production TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true NODE_OPTIONS="-r ts-node/register --no-warnings" webpack --config ./.erb/configs/webpack.config.renderer.prod.ts
scripts.package: node .erb/scripts/clean.js dist && npm run build && electron-builder build --publish never && npm run build:dll
scripts.prestart: npm run build:main-dev && npm run build:preload-dev
scripts.start:preload: cross-env NODE_ENV=development TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true NODE_OPTIONS="-r ts-node/register --no-warnings" webpack --config ./.erb/configs/webpack.config.preload.dev.ts
scripts.start:renderer: cross-env NODE_ENV=development TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true NODE_OPTIONS="-r ts-node/register --no-warnings" webpack serve --config ./.erb/configs/webpack.config.renderer.dev.ts
scripts.build:main-dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true NODE_OPTIONS="-r ts-node/register --no-warnings" webpack --config ./.erb/configs/webpack.config.main.dev.ts
scripts.build:preload-dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true NODE_OPTIONS="-r ts-node/register --no-warnings" webpack --config ./.erb/configs/webpack.config.preload.dev.ts
scripts.start:client: npm run prestart && concurrently --kill-others "npm run start:renderer" "npm run start:electron"
scripts.start:join: PORT=1213 concurrently --kill-others "npm run start:renderer" "npm run start:electron"
